name: Chicken Tetrazzini
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Boneless skinless chicken, cut into 1 to 1 1/2-inch pieces
2 tbsp Olive oil or vegetable oil
10 1/2 oz Can Cream of Chicken Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add linguini and cook according to package directions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
2. Rinse chicken pieces under cold water, then pat dry with paper towels.
3. In a large skillet, heat olive oil or butter over medium-high heat. Add chicken and cook for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until no longer pink but fully cooked through.
4. Remove the chicken from the skillet and keep warm.
5. Add minced garlic to the same skillet and sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant.
6. Add sliced mushrooms and cook over medium heat for about 2 minutes until they are browned.
7. Stir in cream of chicken soup, light cream, grated Parmesan cheese, and reserved cooked chicken. Cook for an additional 1 minute to combine all ingredients.
8. Return the cooked pasta to the skillet with the chicken mixture. Toss until well blended and heated through.
9. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Sprinkle chopped parsley on top if desired.
10. Serve immediately. This dish is ready in less than 20 minutes and serves 4 to 5 people.
Nutritional information: Servings per recipe: 4 to 5; Calories: 500; Protein: 30g; Carbohydrates: 35g; Fat: 26g; Cholesterol: 155mg; Sodium: 730mg
